---
title: "Prevalent cohort of people diagnosed Takayasu arteritis in England on 1st July 2022"
author: "SJ Lax"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    code_folding: hide
  pdf_document: default
---

### Setup

```{r setup}
#install packages at first use
#install.packages("tidyverse", repos = "https://packages.sde.digital.nhs.uk/repository/cran-mirror/", dependencies = TRUE)
#install.packages("odbc", repos = "https://packages.sde.digital.nhs.uk/repository/cran-mirror/", dependencies = TRUE)
#install.packages("DBI", repos = "https://packages.sde.digital.nhs.uk/repository/cran-mirror/", dependencies = TRUE)

#setup markdown
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

#load packages
library(tidyverse)

#load data
library(odbc)
library(DBI)
con <- DBI::dbConnect(odbc:::odbc(), "databricks")
cohort = dbGetQuery(con, 'Select * from dsa_391419_j3w9t_collab.ccu075_01_df_final_20240822_updated') # from 07_mix_step_2_of_3 (core table of cohort)
lsoas_pre_index = dbGetQuery(con, 'Select * from dsa_391419_j3w9t_collab.ccu075_01_lsoa_pre_index_date_final_updated') # from 18_LSOA01_impute_updated
lsoa_2001_2011_long = dbGetQuery(con, 'Select * from dsa_391419_j3w9t_collab.hds_cur_lsoa_imd_lookup_long') # Lookup table for LSOA to IMDs
lsoa_2011_regions = dbGetQuery(con, 'Select * from dsa_391419_j3w9t_collab.hds_cur_lsoa_region_lookup') # Lookup table for LSOA to region
ethnicities = dbGetQuery(con, 'Select * from dsa_391419_j3w9t_collab.ccu075_01_df_eth_grouped_final_20240918_updated') # Updated list of ethnicity data
DBI::dbDisconnect(con)

# simplify ethnicities for linkage
ethnicities2 <- ethnicities %>%
  select(PERSON_ID_DEID, Eth_grouped)

# add ethnicities to cohort
cohort_with_ethnicities <- left_join(cohort, ethnicities2, by=c("PERSON_ID_DEID"))
# unique(cohort_with_ethnicities$Eth_grouped)

# Remove individuals less than 2 years at adjusted diagnosis date
cohort_over_2 <- cohort_with_ethnicities %>%
  mutate(sex = ifelse(SEX == 1, "Male", "Female")) %>%
  mutate(age_group = case_when(
    final_age <= 15 ~ "0-15",
    final_age > 15 & final_age <= 39 ~ "16-39",
    final_age > 39 & final_age <= 54 ~ "40-54",
    final_age > 54 & final_age <= 69 ~ "55-69",
    final_age > 69 & final_age <= 84 ~ "70-84",
    final_age > 84 ~ "85-90"
    ),
  age_group = factor(age_group, 
                     level=c("0-15", "16-39", "40-54", "55-69", "70-84", "85-90")
                     )
  ) %>%
  filter(as.numeric(final_age) >= 2) # number as expected less than full cohort
# summary(cohort_over_2$final_age)
# unique(cohort_over_2$age_group)

lsoas_pre_index <- lsoas_pre_index %>%
  select(PERSON_ID_DEID, LSOA11_curated_pre_index_date, info_LSOA11_pre_index_date)

# merge with LSOA11 at index date and remove non English residents
cohort_over_2_with_prev_lsoas <- left_join(cohort_over_2, lsoas_pre_index, by=c("PERSON_ID_DEID")) %>%
  filter(grepl("E", LSOA11_curated_pre_index_date, fixed=TRUE)) 

# unique(cohort_over_2_with_prev_lsoas$info_LSOA11_pre_index_date)

# restrict to just most recent
imd_mapping <- lsoa_2001_2011_long %>%
  filter(IMD_YEAR == 2019) %>%
  select(LSOA, QUINTILE)
# unique(imd_mapping$QUINTILE)

cohort_over_2_with_prev_imds <- left_join(cohort_over_2_with_prev_lsoas, imd_mapping, by=c("LSOA11_curated_pre_index_date" = "LSOA")) 
# unique(cohort_over_2_with_prev_imds$QUINTILE) # no NA values

region_mapping <- lsoa_2011_regions %>%
  select(lsoa_code, region_code, region_name)

cohort_over_2_with_prev_regions <- left_join(cohort_over_2_with_prev_imds, region_mapping, by=c("LSOA11_curated_pre_index_date" = "lsoa_code"))
# unique(cohort_over_2_with_prev_regions$region_name)

prevalence_cohort_England <- cohort_over_2_with_prev_regions %>%
  filter(REG_DATE_OF_DEATH > "2022-07-01" | is.na(REG_DATE_OF_DEATH)) %>%
  filter(final_diag_date <= "2022-07-01") %>%
  mutate(age_at_index = floor(as.numeric((date("2022-07-01") - dob_apc_op)/365.25))) %>%
  mutate(age_group_index = case_when(
    age_at_index <= 15 ~ "0-15",
    age_at_index > 15 & age_at_index <= 39 ~ "16-39",
    age_at_index > 39 & age_at_index <= 54 ~ "40-54",
    age_at_index > 54 & age_at_index <= 69 ~ "55-69",
    age_at_index > 69 & age_at_index <= 84 ~ "70-84",
    age_at_index > 84 ~ "85-90"
    ),
  age_group_index = factor(age_group_index, 
                     level=c("0-15", "16-39", "40-54", "55-69", "70-84", "85-90")
                     )
  )
# summary(prevalence_cohort_England$final_diag_date) - all before 1st JUly 2022
# summary(as.Date(prevalence_cohort_England$REG_DATE_OF_DEATH)) - all after 1st July 2022 or NA
# prevalence_cohort_England_check_ages <- prevalence_cohort_England %>%
#   select(PERSON_ID_DEID, dob_apc_op, final_diag_date, final_age, age_group, age_at_index, age_group_index)
# head(prevalence_cohort_England_check_ages)

# Saving the cleaned table to the project area
# setwd("D:/PhotonUser/My Files/Home Folder/ccu075_01")
# write.csv2(prevalence_cohort_England, "ccu075_01_M314_p_cohort_20241007.csv")
```

### Version

```{r version, echo=FALSE}
sessionInfo()
```
